STEVE'S FAMOUS DINER

Its most recent inspection on April 2, 2026 cited 1 high-priority, 3 intermediate, and 6 basic violations. It currently ranks safer than 23% of Volusia County restaurants we grade. Diner rating: 4.5 from 2,252 reviews.

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. April 2, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 6 basic

    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 13 — Clean clothes; hair restraints; jewelry; fingernails
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 27 — Water source safe; hot and cold water under pressure
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×2)

  2. September 23, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    2 high-priority · 0 intermediate · 6 basic

    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
